form.formComment: Won all to date. Racing first-up today. Not seen since winning won by 1.3 len Caulfield Heath Cl1 February 9 over 1200m defeating Savitri carrying 59kg at $1.65. On debut favourite; won by 2.75 len Sale Mdn-Sw January 8 over 1100m defeating Keep It Real carrying 58kg at $2. Very progressive and can remain unbeaten.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Won all to date. Racing first-up today. Not seen since winning won by 1.3 len Caulfield Heath Cl1 February 9 over 1200m defeating Savitri carrying 59kg at $1.65. On debut favourite; won by 2.75 len Sale Mdn-Sw January 8 over 1100m defeating Keep It Real carrying 58kg at $2. Very progressive and can remain unbeaten.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation seventh of 10 at Caulfield in the G2 Sand Gneas November 15 over 1600m, 8 len behind Sheza Alibi carrying 57kg at $13. On debut third of 9 at Mornington 3yo Mdn-Sw September 18 over 1200m, 1.0 len behind Sassy For Sure carrying 58kg at $6. Expecting a effective return.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-12.5). Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation seventh of 10 at Caulfield in the G2 Sand Gneas November 15 over 1600m, 8 len behind Sheza Alibi carrying 57kg at $13. On debut third of 9 at Mornington 3yo Mdn-Sw September 18 over 1200m, 1.0 len behind Sassy For Sure carrying 58kg at $6. Expecting a effective return.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 50m, restrained when tightened for room between Kaleo and Matahga.
Slow into stride and then hampered by Macristal House.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up ran on from midfield and won by 2 len at Kilmore 3yo Mdn-Sw February 13 over 1100m defeating Kadesh carrying 58kg at $1.35. Second-up ran on from midfield; 3rd of 10 at Caulfield Vgold Dash on March 14 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Nostra Bella with 56.5kg at $6. Good run last time and that reads well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Third-up today. First-up ran on from midfield and won by 2 len at Kilmore 3yo Mdn-Sw February 13 over 1100m defeating Kadesh carrying 58kg at $1.35. Second-up ran on from midfield; 3rd of 10 at Caulfield Vgold Dash on March 14 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Nostra Bella with 56.5kg at $6. Good run last time and that reads well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced greenly under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: Having third race start. At debut, favourite; scored a big 5.5 len win at Werribee Mdn-Sw February 17 over 1100m defeating Watten Assett with 59kg at $6.50. Last start 7th of 10 at Caulfield Vgold Dash on March 14 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Nostra Bella carrying 57kg at $2.45. Respecting market last time, look for him to bounce back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6.5). Having third race start. At debut, favourite; scored a big 5.5 len win at Werribee Mdn-Sw February 17 over 1100m defeating Watten Assett with 59kg at $6.50. Last start 7th of 10 at Caulfield Vgold Dash on March 14 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Nostra Bella carrying 57kg at $2.45. Respecting market last time, look for him to bounce back.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running from the 500m until near the 200m.

form.formComment: Comes off a 41 day let-up. At the latest run eased back early on 4th of 7 at this track 3yo Bm64 on March 6 over 1400m, 4 len behind Cafe Au Lait with 58kg at $15. The race before that 4th of 9 at Sandown-Hillside 3yo Bm64 on February 4 over 1300m, 3 len behind Stormbender with 58kg at $15. Place chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Comes off a 41 day let-up. At the latest run eased back early on 4th of 7 at this track 3yo Bm64 on March 6 over 1400m, 4 len behind Cafe Au Lait with 58kg at $15. The race before that 4th of 9 at Sandown-Hillside 3yo Bm64 on February 4 over 1300m, 3 len behind Stormbender with 58kg at $15. Place chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in at the start and bumped with Firerated.
From the 200m shifted wider to secure clear running.
Passing the 800m clipped the heels of Brilliant Horizon and blundered.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months won by 0.8 len at Bendigo Mdn-Sw March 27 over 1000m defeating Yuuki carrying 59kg at $2. Previously second-up 2nd of 10 at Kilmore 3yo Mdn-Sw on October 31 over 1112m, 1.3 len behind Chicago Blues carrying 58kg at $2.45. Tougher now but profiles nicely.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Second run back. First-up after four months won by 0.8 len at Bendigo Mdn-Sw March 27 over 1000m defeating Yuuki carrying 59kg at $2. form.formComment: Resuming after a break of five-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation fifth of 9 at Bendigo 3yo Bm64 October 29 over 1300m, 3.5 len behind Hey Jessie carrying 59.5kg at $15. First up last campaign fourth of 7 at Cranbourne Bm66 October 10 over 1300m, 2.25 len behind Nation State carrying 56kg at $3.50. See this one.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 7 at Sale F&M Bm62 on March 1 over 1112m, slow going 1.5 len behind Juice Box carrying 59.5kg at $2.60. Second run from a spell second last of 7 at Cranbourne F&M Bm62 on March 20 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Nerola carrying 59.5kg at $4.20. Rough hope.
